# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <form>
        <div>
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-body-form-start-tag-with-active-form-pointer
  tree-builder: in-body-form-end-tag-non-current-form
  tree-builder: in-body-form-end-tag-without-form-pointer
